mapper.select: SELECT s.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code, s.UPDATED_AT AS updated_at FROM STUDENT s WHERE s.STUDENT_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT SET PARENT_LINK_CODE = #{parentLinkCode}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{studentId}
mapper.select: SELECT s.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code, s.UPDATED_AT AS updated_at FROM STUDENT s WHERE s.PARENT_LINK_CODE = #{parentLinkCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STUDENT_PARENT ( LINK_ID, STUDENT_ID, PARENT_ID, LINK_STATUS, RELATION_TYPE, LINKED_AT, UNLINKED_AT ) VALUES ( student_parent_seq.NEXTVAL, #{studentId}, #{parentId}, 1, #{relationType}, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT sp.LINK_ID AS link_id, sp.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, sp.PARENT_ID AS parent_id, sp.LINK_STATUS AS link_status, sp.RELATION_TYPE AS relation_type, sp.LINKED_AT AS linked_at, sp.UNLINKED_AT AS unlinked_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code FROM STUDENT_PARENT sp INNER JOIN STUDENT s ON sp.STUDENT_ID = s.STUDENT_ID WHERE sp.PARENT_ID = #{parentMemberId} AND sp.LINK_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY sp.LINKED_AT DESC

SELECT sp.LINK_ID AS link_id, sp.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, sp.PARENT_ID AS parent_id, sp.LINK_STATUS AS link_status, sp.RELATION_TYPE AS relation_type, sp.LINKED_AT AS linked_at, sp.UNLINKED_AT AS unlinked_at, p.PARENT_NAME AS parent_name, m.EMAIL AS email FROM STUDENT_PARENT sp INNER JOIN PARENT p ON sp.PARENT_ID = p.PARENT_ID INNER JOIN MEMBER m ON sp.PARENT_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE sp.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND sp.LINK_STATUS = 1 ORDER BY sp.LINKED_AT DESC

SELECT sp.LINK_ID AS link_id, sp.STUDENT_ID AS student_id, sp.PARENT_ID AS parent_id, sp.LINK_STATUS AS link_status, sp.RELATION_TYPE AS relation_type, sp.LINKED_AT AS linked_at, sp.UNLINKED_AT AS unlinked_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS student_name, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image, s.PARENT_LINK_CODE AS parent_link_code,
NVL(c."YEAR", 0) AS class_year, NVL(c.GRADE, 0) AS class_grade, NVL(c.CLASS_NO, 0) AS class_no_alias, c.CLASS_NAME AS class_name_alias,
NVL(( SELECT MAX(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(r.REPORT_CONTENT, 4000, 1)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY r.CREATED_AT) FROM REPORT r WHERE r.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} ), '등록된 선생님 코멘트가 없습니다.') AS teacher_comment,
NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARNING_LIST ll WHERE ll.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID ), 0) AS total_learning_count,
NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_PRO lp JOIN LEARNING_LIST ll ON lp.LEARN_LIST_ID = ll.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE lp.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND ll.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID AND lp.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' ), 0) AS completed_learning_count,
NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC(SUM(CASE WHEN lp.STATUS = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*)) END FROM LEARN_PRO lp JOIN LEARNING_LIST ll ON lp.LEARN_LIST_ID = ll.LEARN_LIST_ID WHERE lp.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND ll.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID ), 0) AS learning_progress_rate,
NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT a WHERE a.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID AND a.DELETE_YN = 0 ), 0) AS total_assignment_count,
NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGN_SUB sb JOIN ASSIGNMENT a ON sb.ASSIGN_ID = a.ASSIGN_ID WHERE sb.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND a.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID AND a.DELETE_YN = 0 AND sb.SUBMIT_STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' ), 0) AS submitted_assignment_count,
NVL(( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE TRUNC(SUM(CASE WHEN sb.SUBMIT_STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*)) END FROM ASSIGNMENT a LEFT JOIN ASSIGN_SUB sb ON a.ASSIGN_ID = sb.ASSIGN_ID AND sb.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} WHERE a.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID AND a.DELETE_YN = 0 ), 0) AS assignment_rate,
NVL(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NOTICE n JOIN STUDENT_CLASS sc2 ON n.CLASS_ID = sc2.CLASS_ID WHERE sc2.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND (sc2.END_DATE IS NULL OR sc2.END_DATE >= SYSDATE) AND n.CONFIRM_YN = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NOTICE_CONFIRM nc WHERE nc.NOTICE_ID = n.NOTICE_ID AND nc.MEMBER_ID = #{parentId} AND nc.CONFIRMED_YN = 1 ) ), 0) AS unconfirmed_notice_count
FROM STUDENT_PARENT sp JOIN STUDENT s ON sp.STUDENT_ID = s.STUDENT_ID LEFT JOIN STUDENT_CLASS sc ON s.STUDENT_ID = sc.STUDENT_ID AND (sc.END_DATE IS NULL OR sc.END_DATE >= SYSDATE) LEFT JOIN CLASS c ON sc.CLASS_ID = c.CLASS_ID WHERE sp.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND sp.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND sp.LINK_STATUS = 1 AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT_PARENT SET LINK_STATUS = 1, LINKED_AT = SYSDATE, UNLINKED_AT = NULL WHERE LINK_ID = ( SELECT MAX(LINK_ID) FROM STUDENT_PARENT WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} ) AND LINK_STATUS = 0
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.EMAIL AS email, 'STUDENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS name, s.BIRTH AS birth, s.GENDER AS gender, s.INTRO AS intro, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN STUDENT s ON m.MEMBER_ID = s.STUDENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.EMAIL AS email, 'PARENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, p.PARENT_NAME AS name, p.BIRTH AS birth, NULL AS gender, p.INTRO AS intro, p.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN PARENT p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.PARENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.EMAIL AS email, 'TEACHER' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, t.TEACHER_NAME AS name, t.BIRTH AS birth, NULL AS gender, t.INTRO AS intro, t.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN TEACHER t ON m.MEMBER_ID = t.TEACHER_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE STUDENT SET STUDENT_NAME = #{name}, BIRTH = #{birth}, GENDER = #{gender}, INTRO = #{intro}, PROFILE_IMAGE = #{profile_image} WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{member_id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.PWD AS pwd, m.EMAIL AS email, s.PHONE AS phone, 'STUDENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, s.STUDENT_NAME AS name, s.BIRTH AS birth, s.GENDER AS gender, s.INTRO AS intro, s.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN STUDENT s ON m.MEMBER_ID = s.STUDENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.PWD AS pwd, m.EMAIL AS email, p.PHONE AS phone, 'PARENT' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, p.PARENT_NAME AS name, p.BIRTH AS birth, NULL AS gender, p.INTRO AS intro, p.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN PARENT p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.PARENT_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS member_id, m.LOGIN_ID AS login_id, m.PWD AS pwd, m.EMAIL AS email, t.PHONE AS phone, 'TEACHER' AS role_code, m.CREATED_AT AS created_at, t.TEACHER_NAME AS name, t.BIRTH AS birth, NULL AS gender, t.INTRO AS intro, t.PROFILE_IMAGE AS profile_image FROM MEMBER m JOIN TEACHER t ON m.MEMBER_ID = t.TEACHER_ID WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET EMAIL = #{email}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}
UPDATE MEMBER SET PWD = #{pwd}, PWD_CHANGED_AT = SYSDATE, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
